ignoreCommand: if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ] || [ "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then exit 0; fi; if git diff --quiet "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA" -- web package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml vercel.json; then echo 'Skipping build: no changes in web'; exit 1; else echo 'Building: web or build-config changed'; exit 0; fi
